steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0007, t0046, t0047 are completed.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure and initial files.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: paper corpus already exhaustively reviewed in t0046 + t0047.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no new external information needed.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0046 simplerun for soma section access pattern, NEURON SEClamp docs, and the channel-isolation override pattern (b2gampa, b2gnmda, gabaMOD).

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the SEClamp wrapper, channel-isolation protocol, and per-channel current-to-conductance conversion.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Implement SEClamp wrapper, run 32-trial channel-isolation sweep at gNMDA=0.5, populate the answer asset.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: hypothesis-test design with explicit H0/H1/H2 verdict; no out-of-the-box analysis required.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results files; render SEClamp conductance bar chart and per-syn-direct vs SEClamp modality comparison.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare SEClamp NMDA / AMPA / GABA conductances against paper Fig 3A-E values within +/-25%.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions based on H0/H1/H2 verdict.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task.json completed, prepare PR.
